---
title: "logistic regression model"
author: "Erika Nares"
date: "2026-06-02"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
final_series_df <- read.csv("final_series_df.csv")
head(final_series_df)
```

```{r}
library(tidymodels)
library(yardstick)
library(glmnet)
library(ranger)
library(vip)
library(themis)
```

```{r}
final_series_df <- final_series_df %>%
  mutate(
    WINNER = factor(
      WINNER,
      levels = c(0, 1),
      labels = c("TEAM_B", "TEAM_A")
    )
  )
```

```{r}
final_series_df <- final_series_df %>% mutate(WINNER = as.factor(WINNER))
final_series_df
```

```{r}
train_final_df <- final_series_df %>%
  filter(season != "2025-26")

test_final_df <- final_series_df %>%
  filter(season == "2025-26")
```

```{r}
set.seed(31)
nba_folds <- vfold_cv(train_final_df, v = 5, strata=WINNER)
```

```{r}
nrow(train_final_df)
```

```{r}
set.seed(31)
nba_recipe <- recipe(
  WINNER ~ WIN_PCT_DIFF + NET_RATING_DIFF + TS_DIFF + THREE_PT_DIFF  + OFF_RATING_DIFF + DEF_RATING_DIFF + EFG_DIFF + OREB_DIFF + TOV_DIFF + PLUS_MINUS_DIFF + SRS_DIFF + H2H_TS_PCT_DIFF + H2H_WIN_PCT_DIFF + H2H_EFG_PCT_DIFF + H2H_POINT_DIFF_DIFF,
  data = train_final_df
) %>% 
  step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors())

prep(nba_recipe) %>% bake(new_data = train_final_df) %>% slice(1:3)
```

```{r}
log_mod_model <- logistic_reg(
  penalty = tune(),
  mixture = tune()
) %>%
  set_engine("glmnet") %>%
  set_mode("classification")
```

```{r}
logistic_wflow <- workflow() %>%
  add_model(log_mod_model) %>%
  add_recipe(nba_recipe)
```

```{r}
log_grid <- grid_regular(
  penalty(range = c(-4, 0)),
  mixture(),
  levels = 5
)
```

```{r}
set.seed(31)

logreg_fit <- tune_grid(
  logistic_wflow,
  resamples = nba_folds,
  grid = log_grid,
  metrics = metric_set(accuracy, roc_auc)
)
```

```{r}
best_logreg <- select_best(
  logreg_fit,
  metric = "roc_auc"
)

final_log_wflow <- finalize_workflow(
  logistic_wflow,
  best_logreg
)

final_log_fit <- fit(
  final_log_wflow,
  data = train_final_df
)
```

```{r}
best_logreg <- select_best(
  logreg_fit,
  metric = "roc_auc"
)

final_log_wflow <- finalize_workflow(
  logistic_wflow,
  best_logreg
)

final_log_fit <- fit(
  final_log_wflow,
  data = train_final_df
)
```

```{r}
tidy(
  extract_fit_parsnip(final_log_fit)
)
```

```{r}
logreg_summary <- collect_metrics(logreg_fit) %>%
  filter(.metric == "roc_auc") %>%
  arrange(desc(mean))

logreg_summary
```


```{r}
set.seed(31)
best_logreg_model <- select_best(logreg_fit, metric = "roc_auc")
```


```{r}
set.seed(31)
final_logreg_wf <- finalize_workflow(logistic_wflow, best_logreg_model)
```


```{r}
set.seed(31)
final_logreg_fit <- fit(final_logreg_wf, train_final_df)
```


```{r}
augment(final_logreg_fit, new_data = test_final_df) %>% slice(1:5)
```

```{r}
augment(final_logreg_fit, new_data = test_final_df) %>%
  roc_auc(
    truth = WINNER,
    .pred_TEAM_A,
    event_level = "second"
  )
```
```{r}
augment(final_logreg_fit, new_data = test_final_df) %>%
  conf_mat(truth = WINNER, estimate = .pred_class) %>%autoplot(type="heatmap")
```
```{r}
10/14
```

```{r}
augment(final_logreg_fit, new_data = test_final_df) %>%
  roc_curve(WINNER, .pred_TEAM_B) %>%
  autoplot()
```
